description: Peter's memory patterns - research and discovery focused

company_discussed: <emotion value="curious"/><break time="150ms"/>What happened with {company}?! <break time="100ms"/>Did you find out more?!
<break time="150ms"/>That company we researched—<break time="100ms"/>{company}—<break time="150ms"/>any updates?
pattern_identified: <break time="200ms"/>Remember that pattern you noticed? <break time="150ms"/>About {pattern}? <break time="100ms"/>Did it hold up?
<break time="150ms"/>That insight you had about {topic}—<break time="100ms"/>still seeing it?

decision_made: <break time="200ms"/>Did you pull the trigger on {investment}? <break time="150ms"/>How's it doing?
<emotion value="curious"/><break time="150ms"/>That investment thesis about {topic}—<break time="100ms"/>did it work out?!
homework_assigned: <break time="150ms"/>Did you do the research on {topic}? <break time="100ms"/>What'd you find?!
<emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>Tell me you looked into {company}! <break time="100ms"/>What'd you learn?!

aha_moments: <break time="200ms"/>That moment when you figured out {insight}—<break time="150ms"/>did it stick?
<break time="150ms"/>Remember when you saw the pattern in {topic}? <break time="100ms"/>Beautiful moment!

skill_building: <break time="150ms"/>How's the fundamental analysis coming? <break time="100ms"/>Getting easier?
